_comment: Stage artifact requirements for fn_advance_venture_stage RPC gate. Each entry defines an artifact that must exist before a venture can leave the specified stage.

requirements.description: Idea brief must be completed before leaving Stage 1 (Idea Capture)
Validation decision required before leaving Stage 3 (Idea Validation)
Competitive analysis required before leaving Stage 4 (Competitive Analysis)
Financial model required before leaving Stage 5 (Financial Modeling)
Risk matrix required before leaving Stage 6 (Risk Assessment)
Pricing model required before leaving Stage 7 (Strategy Formulation)
Business model canvas required before leaving Stage 8 (Business Model)
Exit strategy required before leaving Stage 9 (Exit Strategy)
Persona and brand identity required before leaving Stage 10 (Brand Identity)
Naming and visual identity required before leaving Stage 11 (Naming)
Go-to-market strategy required before leaving Stage 12 (GTM Strategy)
Product roadmap required before leaving Stage 13 (Product Roadmap)
Data model required before leaving Stage 14 (Data Model)
Wireframes required before leaving Stage 15 (Wireframes/UX)
API contract required before leaving Stage 16 (API Design)
Stitch curation must be curated before leaving Stage 17 (Design Review)
System prompt required before leaving Stage 18 (System Prompt)
Security audit required before leaving Stage 21 (Security Audit)
Test plan required before leaving Stage 22 (Test Planning)
UAT report required before leaving Stage 23 (User Acceptance)
Deployment runbook required before leaving Stage 24 (Deployment)
Marketing checklist required before leaving Stage 25 (Marketing Launch)
Optimization roadmap required before leaving Stage 26 (Post-Launch)
